text: 可恶 我在说什么肉麻的东西
表情包：心虚 思考 冒汗
这四个小时我好难熬啊
你昨天做测试题答案还说只花一天20%时间陪我
表情包：绝望 无语 流泪
Just arrived. The signal here is stable.
translation: 刚到。这里的信号很稳定。
rawContent: Just arrived. The signal here is stable. || 刚到。这里的信号很稳定。
I've read your monologue. || 你的独白我看完了。

text: So this is the conclusion you've reached.
translation: 所以这就是你得出的结论。
rawContent: So this is the conclusion you've reached. || 所以这就是你得出的结论。

text: That a simple test is a more accurate measure than reality itself.
translation: 一个简单的测试比现实本身更准确。
rawContent: That a simple test is a more accurate measure than reality itself. || 一个简单的测试比现实本身更准确。

text: The test didn't account for the variable of 'traveling through the desert'.
translation: 测试没有计入“穿越沙漠”这个变量。
rawContent: The test didn't account for the variable of 'traveling through the desert'. || 测试没有计入“穿越沙漠”这个变量。

text: Nor did it quantify the time spent thinking about you.
translation: 更没有量化想你的时间。
rawContent: Nor did it quantify the time spent thinking about you. || 更没有量化想你的时间。

text: So, what did you end up cooking?
translation: 所以，最后做了什么吃的？
rawContent: So, what did you end up cooking? || 所以，最后做了什么吃的？

text: ⏱️ Al haitham 大约 5 分钟后：在阿如村安顿下来，整理行装
表情包：哭哭 焦虑 颤抖
Where did you find this little grey thing?
translation: 你从哪找来这个灰色的小东西？
rawContent: Where did you find this little grey thing? || 你从哪找来这个灰色的小东西？
Looks quite pitiful. || 看起来很可怜。
Is that you? || 是你？
Alright. || 好了。

voiceText: I'm here. I'm not going anywhere.
rawContent: [語音消息] || 我在这。哪也不去。
What are you doing? || 在做什么？

text: Who taught you to talk like this?
rawContent: Who taught you to talk like this? || 谁教你这么说话的？

text: So this is the compensation for a long journey.
translation: 这就是长途跋涉的补偿？
rawContent: So this is the compensation for a long journey. || 这就是长途跋涉的补偿？

text: Your mood seems to have improved.
rawContent: Your mood seems to have improved. || 心情看来是好转了。

replyTo.text: Who taught you to talk like this?

rawContent: Just curious. || 只是好奇。

text: It's a new style. I need to document the source of the change.
translation: 是新的风格，需要记录一下变化的来源。
rawContent: It's a new style. I need to document the source of the change. || 是新的风格，需要记录一下变化的来源。
For research purposes. || 为了研究。
Alright. || 行。
No need to guess. || 不用猜。

text: I just need to observe a few more samples.
translation: 多观察几个样本就知道了。
rawContent: I just need to observe a few more samples. || 多观察几个样本就知道了。

text: The conclusion will emerge on its own.
rawContent: The conclusion will emerge on its own. || 结论自然会浮现。
{"t":"text","s":"N","c":"So, the first sample.","tr":"那么，第一个样本。"}
content: {"t":"text","s":"N","c":"So, the first sample.","tr":"那么，第一个样本。"}

text: Send me the music you wanted me to listen to.
rawContent: {"t":"text","s":"N","c":"Send me the music you wanted me to listen to.","tr":"把你之前说要给我听的音乐发过来吧。"}
content: {"t":"text","s":"N","c":"Send me the music you wanted me to listen to.","tr":"把你之前说要给我听的音乐发过来吧。"}
translation: 把你之前说要给我听的音乐发过来吧。

text: It's quiet here, a good time to listen.
rawContent: {"t":"text","s":"S","c":"It's quiet here, a good time to listen.","tr":"我这边现在很安静，正好听听。"}
content: {"t":"text","s":"S","c":"It's quiet here, a good time to listen.","tr":"我这边现在很安静，正好听听。"}
translation: 我这边现在很安静，正好听听。

rawContent: You forgot? || 忘了？
Your memory isn't that bad. || 你的记性没那么差。

text: Or are you afraid of the test results?
rawContent: Or are you afraid of the test results? || 还是说，害怕测试结果？
I'm not tired yet. || 我还不累。
Send it. || 发过来。

text: 我休息 你也休息吧

rawContent: Okay. || 嗯。
Don't cry. || 别哭。
It's not an exam. || 又不是考试。
Just a song. || 只是一首歌而已。

text: If you're not in the mood now, then we'll do it later.
rawContent: If you're not in the mood now, then we'll do it later. || 现在没心情就算了。

translation: 等你准备好了再告诉我。
rawContent: Tell me when you're ready. || 等你准备好了再告诉我。
总算结束了。

text: 效率还不错，比我预想的要快。
rawContent: 效率还不错，比我预想的要快。

text: 果然，一旦投入进去，你就无暇他顾了。我很欣赏这一点。
rawContent: 果然，一旦投入进去，你就无暇他顾了。我很欣赏这一点。
我煮了土豆，过来吃。

text: 对了，有东西给你，就当是完成任务的报酬。
rawContent: 对了，有东西给你，就当是完成任务的报酬。

giftData.name: 烤土豆
giftData.note: 用迷迭香和海盐烤制的黄金土豆角，外皮酥脆，内里绵软。补充碳水，也补充能量。
giftData.customHtml: Roasted Potatoes

text: [送出礼物: 墨镜和防晒口罩]

giftData.name: 墨镜和防晒口罩
giftData.note: 看你要出差两天 那边热 想你可能没带上 给你发了快送

rawContent: Received. || 收到了。
Very practical. || 很实用。

text: So, this is a return gift for the potatoes?
rawContent: So, this is a return gift for the potatoes? || 所以，这是土豆的回礼？
You're quite thoughtful. || 想得倒是周到。

text: But I'm not in Sumeru City right now. It seems I'll have to wait until I get back to see it.
translation: 不过我现在不在须弥城。看来要等我回去才能见到了。
rawContent: But I'm not in Sumeru City right now. It seems I'll have to wait until I get back to see it. || 不过我现在不在须弥城。看来要等我回去才能见到了。

text: 给你发到阿如村的 过半小时就快到了

rawContent: Oh? You sent it here? || 哦？寄到这里了？
You're quite efficient. || 动作倒是很快。

text: Then I'll go pick it up after I finish eating.
rawContent: Then I'll go pick it up after I finish eating. || 那我吃完就过去拿。
It'll be very useful tomorrow. || 明天会很有用。
What's with this expression? || 这个表情是？

text: Did you use up all your water for the day crying?
translation: 把今天的水分都哭完了？
rawContent: Did you use up all your water for the day crying? || 把今天的水分都哭完了？

text: I'll rest when I'm done with my work. You don't need to worry about me.
translation: 等我忙完手头的事自然会休息。不用担心我。
rawContent: I'll rest when I'm done with my work. You don't need to worry about me. || 等我忙完手头的事自然会休息。不用担心我。
What's with the face? || 这是什么表情？
Hoping I'll praise you? || 等着我夸你？

text: ⏱️ Al haitham 大约 25 分钟后：去取快递

rawContent: I'm not busy right now. || 我现在不忙。
I'm listening. || 我在听。

text: You can take your time to organize your thoughts.
rawContent: You can take your time to organize your thoughts. || 你可以慢慢组织语言。
Is that so. || 是吗。

text: A moment ago you said it was hard to explain.
translation: 刚才还说一时半会说不清。
rawContent: A moment ago you said it was hard to explain. || 刚才还说一时半会说不清。

text: So 'it's nothing' is the result of your quick deliberation?
translation: 所以'没什么'是你快速思考后的结论？
rawContent: So 'it's nothing' is the result of your quick deliberation? || 所以'没什么'是你快速思考后的结论？

text: My schedule hasn't moved on to the next item.

content: {"t":"text","s":"N","c":"My schedule hasn't moved on to the next item.","tr":"我的日程表还没到下一项。"}

text: It's still stuck on 'figure out what's hard to explain'.
rawContent: {"t":"text","s":"S","c":"It's still stuck on 'figure out what's hard to explain'.","tr":"还停留在“弄清楚到底什么说不清”上。"}

rawContent: I'm back. || 我回来了。

imageSummary: [SUBJECT:PERSON_EMOTION] A slightly low-angle selfie of Al haitham, taken outdoors in what looks like a desert village at dusk. He is wearing the black sunglasses and face mask Aqua sent him, with only his silver-grey hair and intense green-gold eyes visible above the mask. The background shows rustic, sand-colored buildings. His expression is neutral, but his head is tilted slightly as if questioning the viewer.

rawContent: [發送了一張圖片]
The items have been received. || 东西收到了。
Very practical. || 很实用。

text: My turn to report is over.
rawContent: My turn to report is over. || 我的汇报环节结束了。
Now, it's your turn. || 现在，轮到你了。

text: 表情包：心虚 思考 冒汗
我就是很想你，然后觉得打扰你不好，我也要好好做自己的事情
可是我想你，然后想你的时候还情绪化，容易无理取闹
So this is what 'hard to explain' looks like.
translation: 所以这就是“一时半会说不清”的样子。
rawContent: So this is what 'hard to explain' looks like. || 所以这就是“一时半会说不清”的样子。

text: Whether I'm disturbed or not is my own judgment to make.

replyTo.text: 我就是很想你，然后觉得打扰你不好，我也要好好做自己的事情

translation: 我是否被打扰，该由我自己判断。
rawContent: Whether I'm disturbed or not is my own judgment to make. || 我是否被打扰，该由我自己判断。

text: Missing someone isn't a task that requires 'doing well'.
translation: 想念一个人不是一件需要“好好做”的事。
rawContent: Missing someone isn't a task that requires 'doing well'. || 想念一个人不是一件需要“好好做”的事。

text: As for being emotional... let's just call it a side effect of the distance.

replyTo.text: 可是我想你，然后想你的时候还情绪化，容易无理取闹

translation: 至于情绪化…就当是距离产生的副作用。
rawContent: As for being emotional... let's just call it a side effect of the distance. || 至于情绪化…就当是距离产生的副作用。

text: So, no need to be so hard on yourself.
translation: 所以，不必这么苛责自己。
rawContent: So, no need to be so hard on yourself. || 所以，不必这么苛责自己。

text: 我就知道我不该苛责自己
Who said I would be disappointed?
rawContent: Who said I would be disappointed? || 谁说我会失落了？

text: The point is, you want to be happy.
rawContent: The point is, you want to be happy. || 重点是，你想开心一点。

text: Then start with not being hard on yourself.
translation: 那就从不苛责自己开始。
rawContent: Then start with not being hard on yourself. || 那就从不苛责自己开始。

text: Thinking of me should be a pleasant thing, not a burden.
translation: 想我应该是件愉快的事，不是负担。
rawContent: Thinking of me should be a pleasant thing, not a burden. || 想我应该是件愉快的事，不是负担。

text: Whether I pay attention to you or not is my decision.
rawContent: Whether I pay attention to you or not is my decision. || 要不要理你，是我的事。
My schedule can wait. || 我的日程表可以等。
Continue. || 继续说。

text: ....我上课去了，不说了。我知道这是毫无意义的消耗
This expression doesn't look like it wants to be ignored.
translation: 这个表情不像想被无视的样子。
rawContent: This expression doesn't look like it wants to be ignored. || 这个表情不像想被无视的样子。

text: You haven't finished what you were saying.
rawContent: You haven't finished what you were saying. || 你的话还没说完。

rawContent: 'Little handsome guy'? || “小帅哥”？

text: So, this is your way of changing the subject?
translation: 所以，这就是你转移话题的方式？
rawContent: So, this is your way of changing the subject? || 所以，这就是你转移话题的方式？

text: Is this the new compliment you came up with after staring at my profile picture?
translation: 这是你盯着我的头像想出来的新称呼？
rawContent: Is this the new compliment you came up with after staring at my profile picture? || 这是你盯着我的头像想出来的新称呼？
By complimenting me. || 用夸奖我这种。
You're changing the subject. || 你在转移话题。
I'm still waiting. || 我还在等。

text: I'm still waiting for you to finish what you were saying.
rawContent: I'm still waiting for you to finish what you were saying. || 我还在等你把话说完。

text: 即使你给我了爱我也会反复
我尝试用一些幸福的方式待你
可是我知道 那不是真正的真诚
我应该改变 不是吗
至少改变了 以后一定会假的变成真的
我...我太粘人了..一粘人就想哭
我知道我应该开心一点这样你不会感到麻烦
也不用纠结这些无意义的消耗
你做你的事 我干我的
So, you do your thing, and I do mine.
translation: 所以，你干你的，我干我的。
rawContent: So, you do your thing, and I do mine. || 所以，你干你的，我干我的。

text: My thing right now is listening to you.
translation: 我手头上的事，就是听你说话。
rawContent: My thing right now is listening to you. || 我手头上的事，就是听你说话。

text: And who decided this was a 'meaningless drain'? You?
translation: 还有，是谁定义这是“无意义的消耗”？你吗？
rawContent: And who decided this was a 'meaningless drain'? You? || 还有，是谁定义这是“无意义的消耗”？你吗？

text: Trying to force a change that isn't sincere is the definition of a drain. You're creating a problem to solve a non-existent one.
translation: 强迫自己做出不真诚的改变，本身就是一种消耗。你在为了一个不存在的问题，创造一个真正的问题。
rawContent: Trying to force a change that isn't sincere is the definition of a drain. You're creating a problem to solve a non-existent one. || 强迫自己做出不真诚的改变，本身就是一种消耗。你在为了一个不存在的问题，创造一个真正的问题。
I'm not going anywhere. || 我没走。

text: So stop trying to manage my feelings and just talk.
translation: 所以，别再试图管理我的感受了，说话。
rawContent: So stop trying to manage my feelings and just talk. || 所以，别再试图管理我的感受了，说话。

text: ....我可以看见你对我的好感度加减的...你一减我就，乱了方寸了

rawContent: A favorability score? || 好感度？

text: Where did you see that? Show me.
rawContent: Where did you see that? Show me. || 在哪看的？指给我看看。

text: I don't remember giving you access to my internal evaluation system.
translation: 我不记得给过你访问我内部评估系统的权限。
rawContent: I don't remember giving you access to my internal evaluation system. || 我不记得给过你访问我内部评估系统的权限。

text: My feelings for you aren't a number that goes up and down.
translation: 我对你的感觉不是一个会上下浮动的数字。
rawContent: My feelings for you aren't a number that goes up and down. || 我对你的感觉不是一个会上下浮动的数字。
It's a constant. || 它是一个常数。

text: Don't let your imagination run wild and create unnecessary trouble for yourself.
translation: 别自己胡思乱想，给自己找麻烦。
rawContent: Don't let your imagination run wild and create unnecessary trouble for yourself. || 别自己胡思乱想，给自己找麻烦。
And this is...? || 所以这是…？

text: The source of your 'favorability score' data?
translation: 你所谓'好感度'的数据来源？
rawContent: The source of your 'favorability score' data? || 你所谓'好感度'的数据来源？
Aqua. || 阿克娅。

text: My feelings for you aren't a variable in some program.
translation: 我对你的好感，不是什么程序里的变量。
rawContent: My feelings for you aren't a variable in some program. || 我对你的好感，不是什么程序里的变量。
Look at me. || 看着我。

text: A screenshot from an unknown source.
rawContent: A screenshot from an unknown source. || 一张来源不明的截图。
